prompt: Extrait le texte de l'image a_trier/agents/exemple-prompt-A-1-2.png et mets-le dans un fichier.
assertions: Output file is named exemple-prompt-A-1-2.txt (same base name as the source image, .txt extension)
Output contains only verbatim transcribed text, with no 'Summary' section (none was requested)
Transcription accurately reflects the French text in the image without paraphrasing, translating, or summarizing it
Output is non-empty and substantial enough to match the text density visible in the image
